# Pull Request

## Problem

Explain the problem this change addresses and why it matters.

## Approach

Describe the solution and the important trade-offs or alternatives considered.

## Verification

List the checks performed and any relevant result that could not be verified.

## Impact

Describe compatibility, migration, security, operational, documentation, or
template inheritance impact. Write "None" only after considering each category.

## Review readiness

- [ ] The change is focused and contains no unrelated work.
- [ ] Durable documentation is updated where required.
- [ ] Consequential architecture decisions are recorded or explicitly unnecessary.
- [ ] No secrets or sensitive data are included.
